channel.title: GitHub Ruby Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Ruby in GitHub

item.title: maybe-finance/maybe
item.description: The OS for your personal finances

item.title: fastlane/fastlane
item.description: 🚀 The easiest way to automate building and releasing your iOS and Android apps

item.title: discourse/discourse
item.description: A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

item.title: CocoaPods/CocoaPods
item.description: The Cocoa Dependency Manager.

item.title: forem/forem
item.description: For empowering community 🌱

item.title: heartcombo/devise
item.description: Flexible authentication solution for Rails with Warden.

item.title: spree/spree
item.description: An open source eCommerce platform giving you full control and customizability. Modular and API-first. Multi-vendor, multi-tenant, multi-store, multi-currency, multi-language. Built using Ruby on Rails. Developed by @vendo-dev

item.title: zammad/zammad
item.description: Zammad is a web based open source helpdesk/customer support system

item.title: kaminari/kaminari
item.description: ⚡ A Scope & Engine based, clean, powerful, customizable and sophisticated paginator for Ruby webapps

item.title: rapid7/metasploit-framework
item.description: Metasploit Framework

item.title: huginn/huginn
item.description: Create agents that monitor and act on your behalf. Your agents are standing by!

item.title: dependabot/dependabot-core
item.description: 🤖 Dependabot's core logic for creating update PRs.

item.title: teamcapybara/capybara
item.description: Acceptance test framework for web applications

item.title: opf/openproject
item.description: OpenProject is the leading open source project management software.

item.title: doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper
item.description: Doorkeeper is an OAuth 2 provider for Ruby on Rails / Grape.

item.title: Homebrew/brew
item.description: 🍺 The missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

item.title: redis/redis-rb
item.description: A Ruby client library for Redis

item.title: chatwoot/chatwoot
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: ruby/ruby
item.description: The Ruby Programming Language

item.title: vcr/vcr
item.description: Record your test suite's HTTP interactions and replay them during future test runs for fast, deterministic, accurate tests.

item.title: paper-trail-gem/paper_trail
item.description: Track changes to your rails models

item.title: wpscanteam/wpscan
item.description: WPScan WordPress security scanner. Written for security professionals and blog maintainers to test the security of their WordPress websites. Contact us via contact@wpscan.com

item.title: rswag/rswag
item.description: Seamlessly adds a Swagger to Rails-based API's

item.title: activerecord-hackery/ransack
item.description: Object-based searching.

item.title: faker-ruby/faker
item.description: A library for generating fake data such as names, addresses, and phone numbers.
